projects.name: Personal Blog — 0soabood.github.io
projects.description: A personal technical blog built with Docusaurus, hosted on GitHub Pages. Blog-only mode (no docs section). Posts written in MDX.

milestones.description: Initial setup: Docusaurus scaffold, blog-only mode, GitHub Pages config fixed. Three posts published on day one.

recentWork: Fixed docusaurus.config.js: corrected GitHub org from 'Lorchissimo' to '0soabood'
Added trailingSlash: false to resolve GitHub Pages deploy warning
Added authors.yml and expanded tags.yml (general, web, tutorial, architecture, electron, typescript, multi-agent, langgraph, react, local-first, AI)
Published 'Setting Up This Blog' Docusaurus tutorial post
Published 'Building a Local-First AI Shell from Scratch' Aura architecture deep-dive

projects.name: Aura — Local-First Multi-Agent AI Shell
projects.description: Electron + React desktop app with multi-agent LLM orchestration, SQLite persistence, LangGraph ReAct loop, and ADHD-calibrated UX. Seven LLM providers supported.

milestones.description: Blackboard event model with SQLite persistence implemented
LangGraph orchestration replacing DIY ReAct loop
ADHD-calibrated UX: Energy Toggle, Brain Dump Mode, keyboard shortcuts, session resumption badges
7 LLM providers: Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, OpenRouter, Mistral, Cohere, DeepSeek

recentWork: Synthesis Agent added as final cleanup pass to prevent internal tag leakage
Fixed better-sqlite3 ABI mismatch between system Node.js and Electron
Added synthesis guard regex to strip internal routing artifacts from UI output
Phase 5 ADHD UX: Energy Toggle, Brain Dump Mode, streaming ReAct trace, session badges, keyboard-first density mode
nextMilestones: Veto Layer — tiered authorization to block destructive agent actions
Firecrawl integration for live web access
